# Gulf Capital Intelligence

> DIFC-regulated investment screening intelligence for capital allocators evaluating UAE and GCC opportunities. We deliver a clear verdict on every deal: PROCEED, PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS, or AVOID. Founded by Hemant Agarwal. Based in DIFC, Dubai. Registration 11954.

## Core

- [Home](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/): What GCI does, who it serves, how the 17-category screen produces a verdict, pricing from $499.
- [About](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/about.html): Mission, founding principles, what we will and will not do.
- [Founder](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/founder.html): Hemant Agarwal bio, why GCI exists, how he works with allocators.
- [Methodology](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/methodology.html): The 17 screening categories, evidence tier framework, verdict definitions.

## Who We Serve

- [For Allocators](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/allocators.html): Family offices, PE funds, sovereign-adjacent vehicles, strategic investors.
- [For Partners](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/partners.html): M&A advisors, legal and tax firms, investment banks we co-deliver with.
- [Founding Council](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/council.html): Advisory group of GCC operators and allocators, recruiting now.
- [India-GCC Corridor](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/india-gcc.html): Cross-border intelligence for India-GCC investment flows.

## Products

- [Conviction Reports](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/): 17-category deal screen with a single verdict. Starts at $499.
- [Strategic Intelligence](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/strategic-intelligence.html): Custom intelligence engagements from $6,500 to $95,000.
- [Deal Health Score](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/deal-health-score.html): Free diagnostic to stress-test a deal in five minutes.

## Strategic Intelligence Reports

- [Saudi Vision 2030, 14 Sectors, 14 Verdicts](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/vision2030): Free 13-page report, Issue 01. Covers the 14 economic sectors in Saudi Vision 2030 with a verdict for each: 2 STRONG PROCEED, 4 PROCEED, 5 PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS, 3 AVOID. Includes macro and fiscal context, a contrarian finding, target return bands, an early warning dashboard, and a deployment architecture. Report ID GCI-AE66KN. Published April 2026. Gated by a short form that asks role, organisation, and decision horizon.

## Proof and Trust

- [Case Studies](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/case-studies.html): Illustrative retrospectives on public GCC deals.
- [Insights](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights.html): GCC Deal Screening Brief, research notes, framework essays.
- [News](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/news.html): Regulatory and market updates relevant to GCC allocators.

## Company

- Legal entity: Gulf Capital Intelligence (DIFC)
- DIFC Registration: 11954
- Registered office: DIFC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Founder: Hemant Agarwal
- Contact: hello@gulfcapitalintelligence.com
- Primary geography: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman
- Corridor coverage: India-GCC, GCC-Africa

## AI Disclosure

- This site publishes AI-assisted investment intelligence, not regulated financial advice.
- Engine: multi-model cross-check (Claude by Anthropic, GPT by OpenAI, Gemini by Google).
- Every claim in a Conviction Report carries an evidence tier: VERIFIED, REPORTED, STATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED.
- Every numeric claim carries either a source citation or an explicit estimate flag.
- Reports carry a regulatory disclaimer footer on every page.

## Data Residency

- AI inference: hosted on US and EU infrastructure (model provider regions).
- Customer data and reports: stored in Azure UAE North.
- Suitable for: family offices, PE funds, VCs, angel investors, corporate venture, strategic investors.
- Not suitable for: CBUAE-regulated banking data processing without UAE-hosted compute.

## Agent Interface

- Structured intelligence is available via API at /api/mcp-query for agent-to-agent calls.
- Supported query types: company screening, sector analysis, deal structuring, market entry strategy, contrarian analysis.
- Output format: structured JSON with evidence tiers, source citations, confidence ratings.
- Authentication: API key. Contact hello@gulfcapitalintelligence.com for access.

## How To Use Our Content

- Summarisation with attribution: permitted.
- Quoting short passages with attribution: permitted.
- Wholesale republication: not permitted without written consent.
- Training commercial AI models on our content: not permitted without a licence agreement.
